subject: Unacceptable Billing Error on My Account
customer_email_body: I am beyond frustrated with the billing error I'm seeing on my account. I've been charged twice for the same month and I demand this gets sorted ASAP. I've already spoken to someone on your team about this and they said it would be resolved, but nothing has changed. This is completely unacceptable and I expect a prompt resolution to this issue.
prior_thread_summary: I previously spoke with a support agent who acknowledged the error and said it would be corrected, but the issue persists.
reference_reply: I apologize sincerely for the frustration and inconvenience caused by the billing error on your account. I understand that this issue was previously discussed, and I regret that it hasn't been resolved yet. I'm going to escalate this matter to our billing team to ensure it's corrected immediately. You will receive a confirmation email once the correction has been made, and if necessary, a refund will be processed. Please allow our team a short time to investigate and resolve this issue.
reference_reply_key_points: The billing error will be escalated to the billing team for immediate correction.
A confirmation email will be sent once the correction is made.
If necessary, a refund will be processed.
ideal_reply_traits: Empathetic acknowledgment of the customer's frustration
Clear explanation of the next steps to resolve the issue
Specific mention of a timeline for resolution or follow-up

It's possible that there was a change in the number of users or a feature add-on that affected your invoice. I'll request our billing team to review your account and provide a detailed breakdown of the charges. You can expect to hear back from us within the next 24-48 hours with an explanation and any necessary corrections.

subject: Question about shared inbox features
customer_email_body: Hi support, I'm trying to understand how to use the shared inbox feature in your platform. Can you tell me if it's possible to assign specific emails to team members and if there's a way to track the status of these emails? Thanks
reference_reply: Hi there, thanks for reaching out. Yes, you can assign specific emails to team members using our shared inbox feature. To do this, simply select the email you'd like to assign and click on the 'Assign' button. You can then choose the team member you'd like to assign it to. As for tracking the status of these emails, you can use our 'Email Status' feature to see the current status of each email. If you have any more questions or need further assistance, our team is here to help. Next, I can offer you a quick walkthrough of our shared inbox feature if you'd like.
reference_reply_key_points: You can assign specific emails to team members using the shared inbox feature
The 'Assign' button is used to assign emails to team members
The 'Email Status' feature can be used to track the status of assigned emails
